title: Documentation built for LLMs
summary:
A complete overhaul of the documentation surface, featuring one-click copy buttons designed specifically for feeding context to LLM coding assistants.

We rebuilt the documentation surface with modular markdown and added a new guides section. The dashboard now features 'Copy for LLMs' buttons—one click grabs context-aware API, BYOP, CLI, or MCP documentation formatted specifically to be pasted into your AI coding assistant. Less typing, more generating.
